}

custom_game_rule = {
	name = SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule
	group = SAH_GAME_RULES_GROUP
	default = normal_start
	option = { name = normal_start text = SAH_SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule_normal }
	option = { name = maoism text = SAH_SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule_maoism }
	option = { name = orthodox_marxism text = SAH_SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule_orthodox_marxism }
	option = { name = social_democracy text = SAH_SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule_social_democracy }
}

	name = SAH_swi_scenario_start_rule
	group = SAH_GAME_RULES_GROUP
	default = normal_start
	option = { name = normal_start text = SAH_SAH_swi_scenario_start_rule_normal }
	option = { name = federal_council text = SAH_SAH_swi_scenario_start_rule_federal_council }
}
